- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". - verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.

- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.

# Mayoiuta: Open-Source Neural Processing Unit (NPU) Project

> "Loss gradients are irrelevant, let's fit while lost!"

**Mayoiuta** is an open-source Neural Processing Unit (NPU) project aimed at providing a flexible and scalable platform for researchers, developers, and enthusiasts to explore and experiment with various artificial intelligence acceleration technologies.

## Project Vision

Our goals are:

- Openness: Provide a fully open-source NPU design, encouraging community participation and contribution.
- Flexibility: Support a wide range of neural network architectures and computational patterns.
- Scalability: Allow users to adjust the size and performance of the NPU according to their needs.
- Education: Provide a practical platform for learning NPU design and implementation.

## Key Features

- Modular Design: The NPU architecture adopts a modular design, making it easy for users to customize and extend.
- Configurable Parameters: Provides rich configuration parameters, allowing users to adjust the NPU's performance and resource consumption.
- Simulation Environment: Offers a simulator-based simulation environment, making it convenient for users to verify and test before hardware implementation.
- Open-Source Toolchain: Provides an open-source toolchain, including a compiler, assembler, and debugger.
- Detailed Documentation: Provides comprehensive documentation, including design principles, usage methods, and development guides.

## Architecture Overview

Mayoiuta's NPU architecture mainly includes the following core modules:

- Compute Unit (CU): Responsible for executing basic computational operations in neural networks, such as convolution, matrix multiplication, etc.
- Memory Unit (MU): Used to store weights, activation values, and intermediate results.
- Interconnect Network (IN): Responsible for transferring data between CUs and MUs.
- Control Unit (CU): Responsible for controlling the overall operation of the NPU.

## Contributing

We welcome contributions of any kind, including but not limited to:

- Code Contributions: Fixing bugs, adding new features, optimizing performance, etc.
- Documentation Contributions: Improving documentation, adding examples, translating documentation, etc.
- Testing Contributions: Writing test cases, reporting bugs, etc.
- Design Contributions:w Proposing new architectures, optimizing existing designs, etc.

## License

The Mayoiuta project is licensed under the Apache License 2.0. For more details, please see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file.

## Acknowledgements

Thanks to the Tsukinomori Girls' Academy Computational Technology Research Institute.

1	module PE_Array #(
2	    parameter DATA_WIDTH = 16,
3	    parameter ARRAY_SIZE = 8
4	)(
5	    input wire clk,
6	    input wire rst_n,
7	    input wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]  north_in [ARRAY_SIZE-1:0],
8	    input wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]  west_in  [ARRAY_SIZE-1:0],
9	    output wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] south_out[ARRAY_SIZE-1:0],
10	    output wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] east_out [ARRAY_SIZE-1:0],
11	    input wire [3:0]             opcode,
12	    input wire                   start,
13	    output wire                  done
14	);
15	
16	wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] pe_data_h [ARRAY_SIZE][ARRAY_SIZE];
17	wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] pe_data_v [ARRAY_SIZE][ARRAY_SIZE];
18	
19	generate
20	for (genvar i = 0; i < ARRAY_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin : row_gen
21	    for (genvar j = 0; j < ARRAY_SIZE; j = j + 1) begin : col_gen
22	        Processing_Element #(
23	            .DATA_WIDTH(DATA_WIDTH)
24	        ) u_pe (
25	            .clk(clk),
26	            .rst_n(rst_n),
27	            .north_in(i == 0 ? north_in[j] : pe_data_v[i-1][j]),
28	            .west_in(j == 0 ? west_in[i] : pe_data_h[i][j-1]),
29	            .south_out(pe_data_v[i][j]),
30	            .east_out(pe_data_h[i][j]),
31	            .opcode(opcode),
32	            .start(start),
33	            .done(done)
34	        );
35	    end
36	end
37	endgenerate
38	
39	assign south_out = pe_data_v[ARRAY_SIZE-1];
40	assign east_out = pe_data_h[ARRAY_SIZE][ARRAY_SIZE-1];
41	
42	endmodule
43	
44	module Processing_Element #(
45	    parameter DATA_WIDTH = 16
46	)(
47	    input wire clk,
48	    input wire rst_n,
49	    input wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] north_in,
50	    input wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] west_in,
51	    output reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] south_out,
52	    output reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] east_out,
53	    input wire [3:0] opcode,
54	    input wire start,
55	    output reg done
56	);
57	
58	reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] accumulator;
59	reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] weight_reg;
60	
61	always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
62	    if (!rst_n) begin
63	        accumulator <= 0;
64	        weight_reg <= 0;
65	        done <= 0;
66	    end else begin
67	        case(opcode)
68	            4'h1: begin
69	                weight_reg <= west_in;
70	                done <= 1;
71	            end
72	            4'h2: begin
73	                accumulator <= accumulator + (north_in * weight_reg);
74	                done <= 1;
75	            end
76	            4'h3: begin
77	                south_out <= north_in;
78	                east_out <= west_in;
79	                done <= 1;
80	            end
81	            default: done <= 0;
82	        endcase
83	    end
84	end
85	
86	endmodule

1	module Conv_Engine #(
2	    parameter KERNEL_SIZE = 3,
3	    parameter STRIDE = 1,
4	    parameter PAD = 1
5	)(
6	    input wire clk,
7	    input wire rst_n,
8	    input wire [7:0] feature_map [0:31][0:31],  // 32x32输入
9	    input wire [7:0] weight [0:2][0:2],         // 3x3卷积核
10	    output reg [15:0] conv_result [0:30][0:30]  // 输出特征图
11	);
12	
13	// 滑动窗口生成器
14	reg [7:0] window_buffer [0:2][0:2];
15	always @(posedge clk) begin
16	    for (int i = 0; i <= 30; i++) begin
17	        for (int j = 0; j <= 30; j++) begin
18	            // 窗口滑动控制
19	            if (j == 0) begin
20	                window_buffer[0][0] <= (i > 0) ? feature_map[i-1][j+0] : 0;
21	                window_buffer[1][0] <= feature_map[i][j+0];
22	                window_buffer[2][0] <= (i < 31) ? feature_map[i+1][j+0] : 0;
23	            end else begin
24	                window_buffer[0][j%3] <= window_buffer[0][(j-1)%3];
25	                window_buffer[1][j%3] <= window_buffer[1][(j-1)%3];
26	                window_buffer[2][j%3] <= window_buffer[2][(j-1)%3];
27	            end
28	            
29	            // 卷积计算
30	            if (j >= 2) begin
31	                conv_result[i][j-2] <= 
32	                    (window_buffer[0][0] * weight[0][0]) +
33	                    (window_buffer[0][1] * weight[0][1]) +
34	                    (window_buffer[0][2] * weight[0][2]) +
35	                    (window_buffer[1][0] * weight[1][0]) +
36	                    (window_buffer[1][1] * weight[1][1]) +
37	                    (window_buffer[1][2] * weight[1][2]) +
38	                    (window_buffer[2][0] * weight[2][0]) +
39	                    (window_buffer[2][1] * weight[2][1]) +
40	                    (window_buffer[2][2] * weight[2][2]);
41	            end
42	        end
43	    end
44	end
45	
46	endmodule

1	module Adaptive_PE #(
2	    parameter INT8_MODE = 1,
3	    parameter FP16_MODE = 0
4	)(
5	    input wire clk,
6	    input wire rst_n,
7	    input wire [3:0] precision_mode,
8	    input wire [31:0] din_a,
9	    input wire [31:0] din_b,
10	    output reg [31:0] dout
11	);
12	
13	// 多精度计算单元
14	always @(posedge clk) begin
15	    if (!rst_n) dout <= 0;
16	    else begin
17	        case(precision_mode)
18	            4'b0001: // INT8模式
19	                dout <= $signed(din_a[7:0]) * $signed(din_b[7:0]);
20	            4'b0010: // FP16模式
21	                dout <= fp16_mult(din_a[15:0], din_b[15:0]);
22	            4'b0100: // BFLOAT16
23	                dout <= {din_a[31:16], 16'b0} * {din_b[31:16], 16'b0};
24	            default: // INT16
25	                dout <= $signed(din_a) * $signed(din_b);
26	        endcase
27	    end
28	end
29	
30	// IEEE 754半精度浮点乘法实现
31	function [15:0] fp16_mult;
32	    input [15:0] a, b;
33	    begin
34	        fp16_mult[15] = a[15] ^ b[15];
35	        // 指数处理
36	        if (a[14:10] == 0 || b[14:10] == 0) 
37	            fp16_mult[14:10] = 0;
38	        else 
39	            fp16_mult[14:10] = a[14:10] + b[14:10] - 15;
40	        // 尾数处理
41	        fp16_mult[9:0] = (a[9:0] * b[9:0]) >> 10;
42	    end
43	endfunction

module Data_Reorder #(
    parameter CHANNELS = 64,
    parameter TILE_SIZE = 8
)(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst_n,
    input wire [127:0] mem_data,
    output reg [127:0] pe_data,
    input wire [1:0] data_format  // 0:NCHW 1:NHWC 2:Blocked
);

reg [127:0] reorder_buffer [0:CHANNELS/TILE_SIZE-1][0:TILE_SIZE-1];

// 数据格式转换引擎
always @(posedge clk) begin
    case(data_format)
        2'b00: // NCHW -> PE阵列格式
            for (int c = 0; c < CHANNELS; c += TILE_SIZE) begin
                for (int t = 0; t < TILE_SIZE; t++) begin
                    reorder_buffer[c/TILE_SIZE][t] <= 
                        {mem_data[127:112], mem_data[95:80],  // 通道优先
                         mem_data[63:48],  mem_data[31:16]};
                end
            end
        
        2'b01: // NHWC -> PE阵列格式
            for (int h = 0; h < TILE_SIZE; h++) begin
                reorder_buffer[h%4][h/4] <= 
                    {mem_data[127:120], mem_data[95:88],  // 空间优先
                     mem_data[63:56],  mem_data[31:24]};
            end
        
        2'b10: // Blocked格式
            pe_data <= mem_data;  // 直接传递
    endcase
end

// 输出调度
always @(posedge clk) begin
    pe_data <= reorder_buffer[read_ptr];
    read_ptr <= (read_ptr == (CHANNELS/TILE_SIZE-1)) ? 0 : read_ptr + 1;
end

endmodule

1	module DVFS_Controller #(
2	    parameter VOLTAGE_LEVELS = 4,
3	    parameter FREQ_LEVELS = 4
4	)(
5	    input wire clk,
6	    input wire rst_n,
7	    input wire [7:0] workload,      // 0-255工作量指示
8	    output reg [1:0] voltage_level, // 00:0.8V ... 11:1.2V
9	    output reg [1:0] freq_level     // 00:500MHz ... 11:1.2GHz
10	);
11	
12	reg [15:0] history_buffer [0:7];
13	always @(posedge clk) begin
14	    history_buffer <= {history_buffer[6:0], workload};
15	end
16	
17	// 移动平均计算
18	wire [10:0] moving_avg;
19	assign moving_avg = (history_buffer[0] + history_buffer[1] + history_buffer[2] + 
20	                    history_buffer[3] + history_buffer[4] + history_buffer[5] +
21	                    history_buffer[6] + history_buffer[7]) >> 3;
22	
23	// 调节策略
24	always @(*) begin
25	    case(moving_avg)
26	        0-50:   {voltage_level, freq_level} = 4'b00_00;
27	        51-100: {voltage_level, freq_level} = 4'b01_01;
28	        101-150:{voltage_level, freq_level} = 4'b10_10;
29	        default:{voltage_level, freq_level} = 4'b11_11;
30	    endcase
31	end
32	
33	endmodule

1	module Sparse_Engine #(
2	    parameter SPARSE_THRESH = 0.3
3	)(
4	    input wire clk,
5	    input wire rst_n,
6	    input wire [7:0] activation [0:31][0:31],
7	    input wire [7:0] weight [0:31][0:31],
8	    output reg [15:0] sparse_result,
9	    output reg sparse_valid
10	);
11	
12	// 零值检测逻辑
13	reg [31:0] zero_count;
14	always @(posedge clk) begin
15	    zero_count = 0;
16	    for (int i = 0; i < 32; i++) begin
17	        for (int j = 0; j < 32; j++) begin
18	            if (activation[i][j] == 0 || weight[i][j] == 0) begin
19	                zero_count <= zero_count + 1;
20	            end
21	        end
22	    end
23	    
24	    // 稀疏度判断
25	    if (zero_count > (32*32*SPARSE_THRESH)) begin
26	        sparse_valid <= 1'b1;
27	        // 触发稀疏计算模式
28	        sparse_result <= activation * weight; // 使用专用稀疏乘法器
29	    end else begin
30	        sparse_valid <= 1'b0;
31	    end
32	end
33	
34	// 稀疏矩阵压缩格式处理
35	wire [7:0] compressed_act;
36	wire [4:0] act_idx;
37	sparse_encoder encoder(
38	    .in_data(activation),
39	    .compressed(compressed_act),
40	    .index(act_idx)
41	);
42	
43	wire [7:0] compressed_weight;
44	wire [4:0] weight_idx;
45	sparse_encoder encoder_w(
46	    .in_data(weight),
47	    .compressed(compressed_weight),
48	    .index(weight_idx)
49	);
50	
51	// 稀疏矩阵乘法核心
52	always @(posedge clk) begin
53	    if (act_idx == weight_idx) begin
54	        sparse_result <= compressed_act * compressed_weight;
55	    end
56	end
57	
58	endmodule

1	module Shape_Adaptor #(
2	    parameter MAX_DIM = 4096
3	)(
4	    input wire clk,
5	    input wire rst_n,
6	    input wire [15:0] in_height,
7	    input wire [15:0] in_width,
8	    input wire [15:0] kernel_h,
9	    input wire [15:0] kernel_w,
10	    output reg [15:0] out_height,
11	    output reg [15:0] out_width,
12	    output reg pad_enable
13	);
14	
15	// 动态形状计算
16	always @(posedge clk) begin
17	    // 输出尺寸计算
18	    out_height <= (in_height + 2*PAD - kernel_h) / STRIDE + 1;
19	    out_width  <= (in_width + 2*PAD - kernel_w) / STRIDE + 1;
20	    
21	    // 自动填充检测
22	    pad_enable <= ((in_height % STRIDE != 0) || 
23	                  (in_width % STRIDE != 0)) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
24	    
25	    // 边界保护
26	    if (out_height > MAX_DIM || out_width > MAX_DIM) begin
27	        $display("Error: Output dimension exceeds maximum limit!");
28	        out_height <= MAX_DIM;
29	        out_width <= MAX_DIM;
30	    end
31	end
32	
33	// 运行时配置接口
34	task configure(
35	    input [15:0] new_stride,
36	    input [15:0] new_pad
37	);
38	    STRIDE = new_stride;
39	    PAD = new_pad;
40	endtask
41	
42	endmodule

Now I have a complete understanding of the project. Let me summarize:

**Mayoiuta** is an open-source Neural Processing Unit (NPU) project. It contains:

1. **Hardware RTL (Verilog)** - The NPU hardware design:
   - `top/npu_soc.v` - NPU_SOC: Top-level SoC, multi-core interconnect (NoC), controller, performance monitor
   - `core/pe_array.v` - PE_Array + Processing_Element: Systolic array for matrix multiply, with opcodes
   - `core/conv_engine.v` - Conv_Engine: 3x3 convolution with sliding window
   - `core/adaptive_pe.v` - Adaptive_PE: Multi-precision compute (INT8/FP16/BFLOAT16/INT16), fp16_mult function
   - `memory/mem_ctl.v` - Memory_Controller: Multi-bank memory, host/NPU interfaces, ECC checker
   - `memory/data_reorder.v` - Data_Reorder: NCHW/NHWC/Blocked data layout conversion
   - `power/dvfs_ctrl.v` - DVFS_Controller: Dynamic voltage/frequency scaling based on workload
   - `sparse/sparse_engine.v` - Sparse_Engine: Sparse matrix computation with zero detection and compression
   - `control/shape_adaptor.v` - Shape_Adaptor: Dynamic shape computation for convolution output

content.text:
I now have a complete picture of the project. **Mayoiuta** is an open-source NPU (Neural Processing Unit) project consisting of Verilog RTL hardware design (`hardware/rtl/` across core/memory/power/sparse/control/top subdirectories) and a Windows WDF kernel driver (`driver/win32/`). There's no build/simulation harness in the repo — it's source-for-reading. The top-level `NPU_SOC` wires a parameterized multi-core NoC, and several referenced submodules (`npu_core`, `npu_controller`, `performance_monitor`, `ecc_checker`, `sparse_encoder`) are instantiated but not provided as separate files.

input.rationale: Mayoiuta 是一个由「Verilog RTL 硬件设计 + Windows WDF 内核驱动」两部分组成的开源 NPU 项目，仓库不包含构建/仿真脚手架，定位为源码阅读型项目。学习路线据此分五层递进：第 1 单元（入门）从项目定位、仓库导航到顶层 SoC，帮助读者建立全局地图；第 2 单元（进阶）聚焦核心计算通路——脉动阵列 PE、卷积引擎、多精度自适应 PE；第 3 单元（进阶）覆盖存储与数据调度——存储控制器、数据格式重排、动态形状适配；第 4 单元（专家）讲解高级加速与能效——稀疏计算、DVFS，并以一讲综合端到端数据通路串起前述模块；第 5 单元（专家）落到软硬件接口，讲解 Windows 驱动骨架与 IOCTL/DMA/中断交互。讲义按「单主题、单模块、2-5 个最小模块、配一个可操作实践任务」的原则拆分，依赖关系由整体架构自上而下展开，并将仓库中引用但未提供的子模块（npu_core/npu_controller/performance_monitor/ecc_checker/sparse_encoder）以及若干非标准/待修正的 Verilog 语法如实标注为待确认，避免编造。

理解 ISR 确认中断与 DPC 延迟处理的分工
lectures.practice_task: 为驱动增加一个新 IOCTL（例如 IOCTL_NPU_SET_CONFIG），在 npudriver.h 中用 CTL_CODE 定义命令码，并在 NpuEvtIoDeviceControl 的 switch 中新增对应 case 写入一个配置寄存器。

data.head: 100706ee7dbee8ff5b05d0ca1fcecc887b38187a
data.rationale: Mayoiuta 是一个由「Verilog RTL 硬件设计 + Windows WDF 内核驱动」两部分组成的开源 NPU 项目，仓库不包含构建/仿真脚手架，定位为源码阅读型项目。学习路线据此分五层递进：第 1 单元（入门）从项目定位、仓库导航到顶层 SoC，帮助读者建立全局地图；第 2 单元（进阶）聚焦核心计算通路——脉动阵列 PE、卷积引擎、多精度自适应 PE；第 3 单元（进阶）覆盖存储与数据调度——存储控制器、数据格式重排、动态形状适配；第 4 单元（专家）讲解高级加速与能效——稀疏计算、DVFS，并以一讲综合端到端数据通路串起前述模块；第 5 单元（专家）落到软硬件接口，讲解 Windows 驱动骨架与 IOCTL/DMA/中断交互。讲义按「单主题、单模块、2-5 个最小模块、配一个可操作实践任务」的原则拆分，依赖关系由整体架构自上而下展开，并将仓库中引用但未提供的子模块（npu_core/npu_controller/performance_monitor/ecc_checker/sparse_encoder）以及若干非标准/待修正的 Verilog 语法如实标注为待确认，避免编造。

lectures.title: Mayoiuta 是什么：开源 NPU 项目定位
lectures.topic: 介绍 Mayoiuta 是一个开源 NPU 项目，讲解其定位、愿景与核心特性，并说明项目由 RTL 硬件设计与 Windows 驱动两部分源码构成。
learning_goals: 理解 NPU 与通用 CPU/GPU 在 AI 加速上的区别
说出 Mayoiuta 的四大愿景（开放、灵活、可扩展、教育）与核心特性
识别项目由 hardware/rtl 与 driver/win32 两部分源码组成
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README 后，用 200 字以内写下项目定位摘要；并指出 README 中提到但仓库尚未提供的内容（如编译器/汇编器/调试器工具链、仿真环境），逐项标注为待确认。

lectures.title: 仓库结构与源码导航
lectures.topic: 讲解仓库目录结构：hardware/rtl 下按 core/memory/power/sparse/control/top 分类的 Verilog 模块，以及 driver/win32 下的 Windows 内核驱动源码，建立全局导航地图。
learning_goals: 画出仓库目录树并说明各子目录职责
理解 Verilog 文件名与顶层模块名的对应关系
区分 RTL 硬件部分与驱动部分各自的作用
lectures.practice_task: 列出仓库中所有 .v 文件及其顶层模块名（module xxx），制作一张「文件路径 → 模块名 → 所属功能域」的对照表。

lectures.title: 顶层 SoC 架构：NPU_SOC
lectures.topic: 拆解 npu_soc.v 中的 NPU_SOC 顶层模块：CORES 参数化多核、NoC 互连网络、npu_controller、performance_monitor，以及 PCIe/DDR/中断等外部接口。
learning_goals: 理解 generate-for 实现的参数化多核实例化
理解 NoC 数据在核间的环形/链式传递（noc_data[i] → noc_data[(i+1)%CORES]）
识别顶层对外接口（pcie_data、ddr_data、interrupt、status）
lectures.practice_task: 在 CORES=4 时追踪 noc_data[i] 与 noc_ctrl[i] 的连接关系，画出多核 NoC 的互连拓扑图，并标注哪些子模块（npu_controller/npu_core/performance_monitor）当前为待确认（仓库未提供源码）。

lectures.title: 处理单元与脉动阵列 PE Array
lectures.topic: 讲解 pe_array.v 中的 Processing_Element 与 PE_Array：脉动阵列的 north/west→south/east 数据流、opcode（加载权重/乘加/直通）与累加器机制。
learning_goals: 理解脉动阵列（systolic array）的数据流动方向与边界输入选择（i==0、j==0）
解释三条 opcode（0x1 加载权重、0x2 乘加、0x3 直通）的含义
理解 accumulator 与 weight_reg 的作用
lectures.practice_task: 为 Processing_Element 增加一条新 opcode（例如清零累加器或加偏置 bias），在 case 中写出对应分支并说明其对阵列数据流的影响。

lectures.title: 卷积加速引擎 Conv Engine
lectures.topic: 讲解 conv_engine.v 的 3x3 卷积加速：32x32 特征图输入、滑动窗口生成器、window_buffer 缓冲、九点乘累加，以及 KERNEL_SIZE/STRIDE/PAD 参数。
learning_goals: 理解滑动窗口缓存思路与 window_buffer 的作用
理解九点卷积乘累加与输出特征图 31x31 维度的由来
识别窗口缓冲索引逻辑中的待确认之处（如 j%3 移位写法）
lectures.practice_task: 手动计算 KERNEL_SIZE=3、STRIDE=1、PAD=1 时 32x32 输入对应的输出尺寸，并与代码中 conv_result[0:30][0:30] 的维度对照；指出窗口缓冲移位逻辑中存疑的写法并标注待确认。

lectures.title: 自适应多精度计算单元 Adaptive_PE
lectures.topic: 讲解 adaptive_pe.v 的多精度计算单元：INT8/FP16/BFLOAT16/INT16 四种精度模式切换，以及 fp16_mult 函数实现的 IEEE754 半精度浮点乘法。
learning_goals: 理解 precision_mode 通过 case 选择计算精度的机制
解释 FP16 乘法中符号位、指数（减偏置 15）、尾数的处理
对比 INT8 与 INT16 模式对 32 位输入位宽的不同利用
lectures.practice_task: 给定两个 FP16 值（自行选定），按 fp16_mult 的逻辑手算符号、指数、尾数三段结果，验证与公式一致；并指出该实现相比标准 IEEE754 半精度的近似之处。

lectures.title: 存储控制器与多 Bank 设计
lectures.topic: 讲解 mem_ctl.v 的 Memory_Controller：多 Bank 存储体（BANK_NUM=8）、主机写/NPU 读双接口、地址解码（bank 选择 + bank 内偏移），以及 ECC 校验例化。
learning_goals: 理解 memory_bank 二维数组的组织方式
解释 host_addr[2:0] 选 bank、高位作 bank 内偏移的地址解码
识别 ecc_checker 为待确认的外部例化模块
lectures.practice_task: 计算 ADDR_WIDTH=32、DATA_WIDTH=256、BANK_NUM=8 时每个 bank 的深度（字数）与总存储容量，并说明同一周期内主机写与 NPU 读访问不同 bank 时的行为。

lectures.title: 数据格式重排 Data Reorder
lectures.topic: 讲解 data_reorder.v 的 Data_Reorder：NCHW / NHWC / Blocked 三种数据排布到 PE 阵列格式的转换，reorder_buffer 缓冲与输出调度。
learning_goals: 区分通道优先（NCHW）与空间优先（NHWC）的位拼接差异
理解 Blocked 格式直接透传的设计意图
识别 read_ptr 未声明等待确认的语法问题
lectures.practice_task: 为 data_format 增加一种新排布（例如 CHWN），写出对应的位重排赋值逻辑，并说明该格式适合何种计算模式。

lectures.title: 动态形状适配 Shape Adaptor
lectures.topic: 讲解 shape_adaptor.v 的 Shape_Adaptor：根据输入尺寸、卷积核、STRIDE/PAD 动态计算输出尺寸、自动 padding 检测、MAX_DIM 边界保护，以及运行时 configure 任务。
learning_goals: 掌握卷积输出尺寸公式（(H+2PAD-K)/STRIDE+1）
理解 pad_enable 的触发条件与 MAX_DIM 边界保护
识别 STRIDE/PAD 在模块中来源待确认（未在参数/端口声明）的问题
lectures.practice_task: 修改 configure 任务接口，增加 dilation（膨胀）参数，并据此改写输出尺寸计算公式，同时保留 MAX_DIM 边界保护。

lectures.title: 稀疏计算引擎 Sparse Engine
lectures.topic: 讲解 sparse_engine.v 的 Sparse_Engine：零值检测、稀疏度阈值判断、sparse_encoder 压缩（值+索引）与稀疏矩阵乘法核心。
learning_goals: 理解零值计数与稀疏度阈值 SPARSE_THRESH 的判断
解释压缩格式（compressed 值 + index 索引）的设计
识别 sparse_encoder 为待确认的外部例化模块
lectures.practice_task: 给定一个 4x4 含若干零值的激活矩阵，手算其零值比例并判断是否超过 SPARSE_THRESH=0.3，进而说明 sparse_valid 是否置位。

lectures.title: 动态电压频率调节 DVFS
lectures.topic: 讲解 dvfs_ctrl.v 的 DVFS_Controller：workload 工作量输入、8 级 history_buffer 移动平均滤波、四档电压/频率调节策略。
learning_goals: 理解 history_buffer 移动平均对 workload 的平滑作用
解释四档电压（0.8V~1.2V）/频率（500MHz~1.2GHz）的映射
识别 case 区间语法（如 0-50:）的待确认/非标准写法
lectures.practice_task: 设计一套新的三档调节阈值（取代现有四档），改写 case 逻辑，并说明移动平均窗口长度对调节滞后性的影响。

lectures.title: 全系统数据通路与集成
lectures.topic: 综合讲解一次 NPU 计算请求如何端到端流经系统：SoC 仲裁 → NoC 传输 → 存储控制器取数据 → data_reorder 重排 → PE 阵列/卷积引擎计算 → 结果写回，并梳理架构中待确认/未实现的环节。
learning_goals: 将前述各模块串联为端到端数据通路
识别架构中引用但仓库未提供的子模块与连接断点
理解多核协同与性能监控在整体中的位置
lectures.practice_task: 绘制端到端数据通路框图，标出数据在 SoC→存储→重排→计算→写回各模块间的流动路径，并用不同标记区分「已实现」与「待确认」的环节。

units.title: 设备驱动与软硬件接口

lectures.title: Windows WDF 驱动骨架与 INF
lectures.topic: 讲解 Windows WDF 内核驱动骨架：DriverEntry 入口、NpuEvtDeviceAdd（设备/中断/DMA/IO 队列创建）、setup.inf 的 PCI 设备匹配，以及 npudriver.h 的寄存器与设备上下文定义。
learning_goals: 理解 WDF 驱动加载入口与 DriverEntry 的作用
解释 setup.inf 中 PCI ID（VEN_1ACE&DEV_BEEF）与驱动绑定的关系
理解 NPU_REGISTERS 与 DEVICE_CONTEXT 结构的组成
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 setup.inf 与 npudriver.h，写出该驱动绑定的厂商 ID 与设备 ID，并说明 NPU_DEVICE_ID/NPU_VENDOR_ID 宏与 INF 中 PCI 字符串的对应关系。

lectures.title: 驱动 IOCTL、DMA 与中断交互
lectures.topic: 讲解 npudriver.c 的设备交互：三个 IOCTL（EXECUTE/LOAD_WEIGHTS/GET_STATUS）、寄存器 MMIO 读写、DMA 散列收集传输权重、中断 ISR/DPC 处理。
learning_goals: 理解 IOCTL 命令码的 CTL_CODE 构造方式
解释通过 DMA 加载权重到设备的流程
理解 ISR 确认中断与 DPC 延迟处理的分工
lectures.practice_task: 为驱动增加一个新 IOCTL（例如 IOCTL_NPU_SET_CONFIG），在 npudriver.h 中用 CTL_CODE 定义命令码，并在 NpuEvtIoDeviceControl 的 switch 中新增对应 case 写入一个配置寄存器。
